overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury modern apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a dimly lit kitchen with checkered floors and transitioning through a doorway into a sunlit open-concept living area with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a palm tree-lined terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern kitchen with checkered flooring and dark cabinetry

agents.ego_description: moving through the kitchen past counters and appliances toward a doorway in the corner

entered.detail: long kitchen island with stovetop and various cooking appliances
small red dining table with checkered pattern
black and white checkered tile flooring
modern stovetop with pans and cooking utensils
futuristic purple appliance on the counter
stack of blue and brown luggage cases in the corner
dark wooden door with green light strip above

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dimly lit modern kitchen featuring black and white checkered flooring, dark cabinetry, and various appliances. The space is narrow and enclosed with artificial lighting, ending at a corner with stacked suitcases and a wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury living room with dining area and bar overlooking city

events.description: opening wooden door and transitioning from dark kitchen to bright sunlit living area
picking up an item from the dining table, indicated by game UI showing 1540 eddies

agents.ego_description: entering the spacious living area and exploring toward the large windows, briefly interacting with an object on the dining table

entered.detail: polished dark marble flooring reflecting ceiling lights
long rectangular dining table with white chairs
dark bar counter with shelves of bottles and glassware
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing outdoor terrace
wooden shelves mounted on wall with bottles and decorative items

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious luxury living area with polished marble floors and warm sunlight streaming through large windows. The camera moves past a dining table where an item is briefly picked up, then continues toward the glass wall revealing an outdoor terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-walled living area with view of palm tree terrace

events.description: moving into direct sunlight streaming through the floor-to-ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass wall and panning to observe the outdoor terrace with palm trees and distant mountains

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible through the glass on the outdoor terrace
wooden decking of the outdoor terrace with outdoor furniture
small illuminated light fixtures along the terrace edge
mountain range visible in the far distance beyond the terrace

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the floor-to-ceiling glass wall, entering bright direct sunlight. The view opens to an expansive outdoor terrace with palm trees, modern outdoor furniture, and distant mountains visible under a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, enclosed kitchen into a bright, expansive luxury living space that opens onto a sunlit terrace. It begins by navigating a narrow kitchen with black and white checkered flooring and dark cabinetry, moving past various appliances toward a wooden door. As the camera passes through the doorway, the environment shifts abruptly from artificial shadows to a spacious living area with polished marble floors and warm sunlight streaming through large windows. The scene then expands as the camera glides past a dining table and approaches a floor-to-ceiling glass wall, finally emerging into the direct glare of a clear blue sky over an outdoor terrace featuring palm trees and distant mountains.
